parsed.anchor_rejected_above: Anchor 4 requires (a) services to depend on a thin DB-access abstraction rather than calling raw db.prepare directly — but services/loan.ts calls db.prepare('SELECT * FROM members WHERE id = ?') and 7+ other raw SQL statements directly; (b) frontend organized by feature (checkout/, members/, books/) — but the frontend uses technical-role folders (pages/, components/, api/, hooks/) with empty features/ and hooks/ directories; (c) shared types between frontend and backend in a single source — no shared/ workspace exists, the LoanRow interface lives in services/loan.ts and frontend api/index.ts (119 lines) defines its own types separately.
